title: Blades of Majestica
description: Pack that allows you to change boring minecraft swords into majestic fantasy weapons!
body:
# Blades of majestica
is a resource pack that allows you to change default swords to epic fantasy weapons!

---
HOW TO USE IT?
simply grab any sword in minecraft and rename it in anvil to the name of model you want.
model names are shown on spreadsheet down below.
full list of weapons 
[https://realm-of-majestica.webflow.io](https://realm-of-majestica.webflow.io)

---
TECHNICAL INFO
If you're playing on 1.21.5 or later you don't need any mods installedIf you're playing on 1.21.4 or older version this resource/texture pack requires OPTIFINE or CIT RESEWN MOD to work!
also
And make sure your configs are set corretly:
Option/Video Setting/Quality/Custom Item: ON

names for 1.21.5 have changed so if you're playing on older version please use RP Names mod to see names for weapons

![showcase of features](https://i.ibb.co/GVf6PWP/full-Copy.png)

Pack is frequently updated and I'm open to all feedback might have.
for any questions or feedback please join our discord

[![discord](https://i.ibb.co/W0NNg6K/discord.png)](https://discord.gg/GmKrkXAY83)
